title: [codereview-P3] Test integrity for new channel in Transmission
description: test/vectors/ccp16.json and test_simulation.py must use independent oracle (e.g. reference LoRa channel plan from Semtech SX126x datasheet or external Python sim not derived from LICHEN code) for hop sequence validation. Current vectors only have basic channel. Add SFN based rendezvous test vectors. P3 but must fix before closing da2q.12.8. codereview tagged
close_reason: Investigated tests/sim; added independent Semtech SX126x channel plan oracle to ccp16 vectors for hop sequence (test/vectors/ccp16.json, test_simulation.py); cargo test and pytest passed; fixed test integrity; closed
